# Output Folder Guide

Folder: output\examples\vnpt-order-service\.github\agents

## Purpose

Store generated or working artifacts related to this folder path.

## Naming Convention

- Use kebab-case for filenames.
- Include a date when practical: 	opic-purpose-YYYYMMDD.ext.
- Keep one artifact purpose per file.

## Placement Rules

1. Save files in this folder only if they match the folder purpose.
2. If a file belongs to a specific child category, place it in that child folder instead.
3. Avoid near-duplicate drafts; update existing files when possible.

## Child Folders

- (none)

## Notes

- This README is auto-generated to keep output/ operationally organized.
- If this folder gets a clearer scope later, update this README with folder-specific rules.
